name: DAME 4 Diode Laser
shortDescription: 1200W elite diode laser with USA COHERENT chips, 5 interchangeable spot sizes, and -16°C sapphire cooling. 50 million shot lifespan, 3-year warranty. The new era of elite-level hair removal.
description: The DAME4 is not just another diode laser – it is the one professional salons have been waiting for. Captivating, elite in appearance, yet uncompromising in performance, this device virtually eliminates hair growth in just a few sessions. With 1200W output power and the latest American COHERENT diode technology, treatment time is up to 50% shorter than with most standard floor-standing devices.
metaTitle: DAME 4 Diode Laser | 1200W, USA COHERENT, -16°C Cooling, 3-Year Warranty
metaDescription: DAME4 1200W elite diode laser with USA COHERENT technology. 4 wavelengths, -16°C sapphire cooling, 50M shots, 5 spot sizes, custom color options. 3-year warranty.

videoDescription.headline: DAME 4 – The New Era of Elite-Level Hair Removal
paragraphs: The DAME4 represents the top tier of professional hair removal. A device that works faster than anything you've tried before – while being completely painless, visibly effective, and cost-efficient in the long run.
If you run a salon where clients don't like to wait but love authentic and convincing results, then the DAME4 will be your best investment.

afterVideo.text: Have questions about the DAME 4? We're happy to help!

afterFeatures.headline: Want to see the DAME 4 in person?
afterFeatures.subtitle: Visit our showroom in Érd and try it out yourself!

final.headline: Interested in the DAME 4 diode laser?
final.subtitle: Request a free consultation and we'll help you decide if this is the best choice for you.

featureRows.headline: Why do professionals choose the DAME 4?
featureRows.subtitle: 1200W USA COHERENT power, -16°C cooling, 5 interchangeable spot sizes.

features.title: USA COHERENT diode technology – 12 laser bars
features.description:
At the heart of the DAME4 are 12 American COHERENT laser bars that provide stable, outstanding energy during every treatment. COHERENT chips represent the pinnacle of laser industry technology – delivering more durable, precise, and efficient operation than conventional solutions.

Wavelengths:

755 nm – light, fine hair
808 nm – universal, gold standard
940 nm – darker skin tones
1064 nm – deep-seated hair follicles
features.highlight: After just 2–3 treatments, 80–90% less hair remains.

features.title: 1200W power – twice as fast treatments
features.description: With 1200W output power, the DAME4 quickly covers larger areas. A full body treatment can be completed in as little as 20–30 minutes – that's up to 50% shorter than with most standard floor-standing devices.
features.highlight: Full body treatment in as little as 20–30 minutes.

features.title: -16°C sapphire cooling – completely painless experience
features.description:
The TEC semiconductor + sapphire contact cooling system cools the handpiece down to -16°C. The client only feels the cold – not the laser. No burning sensation, no redness, just silky smooth skin from the very first session.
TEC semiconductor cooling
Sapphire contact cooling surface
Stable even during continuous daily use
features.highlight: The client only feels the cold – not the laser.

features.title: 5 interchangeable spot sizes – for every body area
features.description:
Five ergonomic handpieces allow precise treatment adjustment for every body part. Large spot size for fast treatment of legs and back, smaller spot size for precise work on face and bikini area.

Benefits of interchangeable spot sizes:

Handpiece tailored to each body area
Optimal penetration depth
Faster treatments on large areas
Precisely adjustable energy density

features.title: Intelligent software – automatic parameter optimization
features.description: The DAME4 is not only outstanding in performance but also thinks for you: the intelligent software automatically optimizes laser pulses based on skin and hair characteristics. The device automatically recognizes the settings for the skin type and locks in the ideal parameters.
features.highlight: The device automatically recognizes the skin type and sets the ideal parameters.

features.title: Vertical design – premium salon equipment
features.description:
Vertical (floor-standing) diode laser machines stand out from portable models in both performance and durability. The larger internal space allows for higher-performance cooling systems and more stable power sources, ensuring continuous, long-term operation without overheating.
Ergonomic operation
Better ventilation, more efficient cooling
Custom top panel color options
features.highlight: The DAME4 top panel can be ordered in a custom color, perfectly matching any salon's brand.

features.title: Return on investment – within 1-3 months
features.description:
The DAME4 delivers exceptionally fast ROI, since no consumables are needed for treatments, the device's energy consumption is low, and treatment time is up to half that of conventional devices.
With 5–6 clients per day, ROI in as little as 1 month
50M shots = up to 5–7 years of continuous operation
No consumables, minimal maintenance
features.highlight: For an average-traffic salon, the device pays for itself within 2–3 months.

training.headline: Operator training – official adult education program
training.intro: A professional operator training course is available for the DAME 4 diode laser, provided within the framework of officially registered adult education. The goal of the training is for participants to acquire comprehensive theoretical and practical knowledge for the professional and safe use of the device.
items: Operating principles and safety aspects of diode laser technology
Setting DAME 4 treatment parameters by skin and hair type
Practical treatments on models – on various body areas
Correct application and replacement of the 5 spot sizes
Contraindications, client selection, and pre-treatment protocols
closingParagraphs: You are welcome to bring a model to the training so you can learn the treatment techniques in a real-world environment.
Upon completion of the training, we issue an official FAR certificate confirming your competence in the professional operation of the device.

testimonials.name: Kovács Petra
testimonials.text: The DAME4 is a completely different level compared to my previous device. <mark>The COHERENT chips deliver noticeably more stable performance</mark>, and my clients love how painless the treatment is thanks to the -16 degree cooling.

testimonials.name: Beauty Center Éva
testimonials.text: We've been using it for two months and <mark>it already paid for itself in the first month</mark>. The speed is incredible – a full leg treatment is done in 15 minutes. Clients keep coming back.

testimonials.name: Szilágyi Tamás
testimonials.text: I also work with male clients with dense back and chest hair. <mark>The DAME4's 1200W handles even the thickest hair with ease</mark>, and the 3-year warranty provides great peace of mind.

expertQuote.quote: The DAME4 with its USA COHERENT chips and 1200W power is one of the most serious diode lasers on the Hungarian market. The 3-year warranty and 50 million shot lifespan represent excellent value in the premium segment.
expertQuote.author: Horváth László

faq.question: How does the DAME4 differ from other diode lasers?
faq.answer: The DAME4 uses 12 USA COHERENT laser bars, representing the pinnacle of laser industry technology. The 1200W output power, -16°C sapphire cooling, and 5 interchangeable spot sizes together create a unique combination on the Hungarian market.

faq.question: How quickly does the DAME4 pay for itself?
faq.answer: For an average-traffic salon, within 2–3 months. With intensive utilization (5–6 clients per day), the investment can pay for itself in as little as 1 month. No consumables are needed, and energy consumption is low.

faq.question: What warranty do I get?
faq.answer: We provide a 3-year comprehensive warranty with factory parts and service support. We provide a replacement device during repairs so your salon never stops operating.

faq.question: Is the treatment really painless?
faq.answer: Yes! The TEC semiconductor + sapphire contact cooling system cools the handpiece down to -16°C. The client only feels the cold, no burning sensation, no redness – just silky smooth skin from the very first session.

faq.question: What skin types can it be used on?
faq.answer: It can be safely and effectively used on all Fitzpatrick skin types (I–VI). The 4-wavelength combination simultaneously targets deep and surface hair follicles, delivering excellent results on both light and dark skin tones.

faq.question: Is the DAME4 available for pre-order?
faq.answer: Yes, the DAME4 is available for pre-order with a 3–4 week delivery time. The order is secured with payment of 50% of the full price. Flexible, interest-free installment plans are also available.

faq.question: Can the device's appearance be customized?
faq.answer: Yes! The DAME4 top panel can be ordered in a custom color – whether white, gold, rose gold, or black. This way the device perfectly matches your salon's brand.
